ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der explained Trinity's medical condition, stated that they did not know if she had requested any benefits, that Trinity was living in Arizona with a her half Sister and that they did not know if she is coming back. In addition, Mr. Der stated that the Father's child support is about $30,000.00 passed due, that they are encouraging Trinity to finish high school and that Ms. Dolch is in contact with Trinity's Aunt (Former Trustee of Father's Trust). The accounting petition will be approved but was taken under submission for the Court to review the proposed order. Mr. Der will express the Court's concerns to Ms. Dolch. If anything needs to be brought to the Court's attention, the Court will rely on Mr. Der to do so.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.
